relativeDateRules.name: relativeDay
relativeDateRules.description: time-only relative labels are resolved relative to the current day or yesterday

relativeDateRules.name: weekday
relativeDateRules.description: weekday labels resolve to the most recent matching day within the last 7 days

relativeDateRules.name: timeOnly
relativeDateRules.description: time-only labels are resolved to the current day if within the last 24 hours
